intro: Schizacme novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand Schizacme, is a small, perennial succulent plant native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with traditional uses including treating digestive issues and fever, and its modern applications include potential benefits for immune system support and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Schizacme novae-zelandiae include iridoids, flavonoids, and saponins, which have been shown to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Schizacme novae-zelandiae is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
